title: Betfair Prediction/Value League Scientific Collaboration 49
thesis: Evolve parallel probability models and policy gates until the best value-betting league earns execution rights. This variant fuses game theory/behavioral researcher guidance with bayesian/causal researcher, ecology/evolution researcher to test opponent adaptation, crowd reflexivity, and exploitability of consensus breakdowns; causal priors and uncertainty-aware edge filtering; survival pressure, niche competition, and adaptive response to decaying edges.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
